findings.title: SQL injection via unsanitised input
findings.message: User input is concatenated directly into a SQL query. Use parameterised queries instead.

findings.title: Hardcoded secret key
findings.message: The SECRET_KEY is hardcoded in source. Move to environment variable or secrets manager.

findings.title: N+1 query in user list endpoint
findings.message: Each user lookup issues a separate DB query. Use select_related() or a JOIN.

findings.title: Missing return type annotation
findings.message: Function get_user_by_id lacks a return type annotation. Add -> Optional[User].

findings.title: Unused import
findings.message: The 'os' module is imported but never used in this file.

findings.title: Low confidence finding — should be filtered
findings.message: This finding has confidence below 0.7 and should be excluded by the filter.
